sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى زِيَادٌ دَائِمًا لِتَحْقِيقِ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ عَمَلِهِ وَحَيَاتِهِ الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zijad uvijek nastoji postići ravnotežu između svog posla i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Ziyad always strives to achieve balance between his work and private life.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي سَاعَاتِ الصَّبَاحِ فِي الْمَكْتَبِ لِإِنْجَازِ تَقَارِيرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Provodi jutarnje sate u kancelariji kako bi završio svoje izvještaje.
sentences.translationEn: He spends the morning hours in the office to finish his reports.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ الدَّوَامِ، يُمَارِسُ الرِّيَاضَةَ أَوْ يَجْلِسُ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon završetka radnog vremena, bavi se sportom ili sjedi sa svojom porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: After work hours end, he practices sports or sits with his family.

sentences.arabic: الرَّاحَةُ الْكَافِيَةُ تُسَاعِدُهُ عَلَى الْإِبْدَاعِ فِي مِهْنَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljan odmor mu pomaže da bude kreativan u svojoj profesiji.
sentences.translationEn: Sufficient rest helps him be creative in his profession.
